D12 PsychologyL2 UnderstandReference

Graphical Passwords — Coloured-Grid Mnemonics

PassPoints / Story / PassFaces: instead of alphanumeric strings, users remember a sequence of clicks on a coloured picture grid; recall ~80% at 1 year vs ~30% for 8-char strings

Wiedenbeck (2005) PassPoints used 5 clicks on a picture as the secret. Studies show 1-year recall accuracy ~80% vs ~30% for memorised strings. Colour acts as a strong contextual cue that survives the spacing-effect decay better than abstract characters.

Slide grid size — security ~ N⁵ for 5-click password.
